decoder_heading: What personal information do we collect from the people that use our app?
ident_heading: What personal information do we collect from the people that use our app?
heading_content_part: What personal information do we collect from the people that use our app?Name,Email,Location,Browser History
When do we collect information?At the first start of the app.

decoder_heading: How do we use your information?
ident_heading: How do we use your information?
heading_content_part: How do we use your information?To personalize the user experience for each user. This might be different advertisements or different game behaviour.

decoder_heading: How do we protect your information?
ident_heading: How do we protect your information?
heading_content_part: How do we protect your information?The app does not send your Name and Email outside of the app / other services.
Third-party disclosure We do not sell, trade, or otherwise transfer to outside parties your Personally Identifiable Information.
Opting out:You can opt out by sending an email request to our developer email which you can find in google play store.
